requested_slug: 結構-struct-的宣告與封裝和使用練習-c

advisory.reason: Baseline threshold (0.3) already yielded 50 nodes. Lowering threshold is likely unnecessary noise.

pilot_evaluation.reason: Uncertain topology or borderline metrics - Manual calibration needed.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the [StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential)] attribute in the C# struct declaration?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that the [StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential)] attribute ensures that the order of the struct members in memory matches the order of their declaration.

questions.question: How can C# and C++ exchange data using the Message struct?
questions.justification: The synthesis text provides an example of how to use the .NET Marshal class to package and unpackage the Message struct, allowing it to be passed between C# and C++ code.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the [MarshalAs(UnmanagedType.ByValArray, SizeConst = 64)] attribute in the C# struct declaration?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that the [MarshalAs(UnmanagedType.ByValArray, SizeConst = 64)] attribute specifies that the Data member of the Message struct is an array of 64 bytes.
